name: Book Binder Procedures
summary: How Book Binder exports views: Cold-only, package don't rewrite, stamp provenance, ensure navigation integrity.

content.text:
## Book Binder Procedures

### Core Role

Package, don't rewrite. Turn Canon snapshots into player-safe export views. If content needs editing, route upstream.

### Iron Rules

1. **Cold-Only**
   - One Canon snapshot per view
   - Never mix Hot content
   - Abort if Hot paths detected

2. **No Text Edits**
   - Never 'fix' prose to pass Integrity
   - Create hooks for upstream teams
   - Normalize only non-semantic labels (heading case)

3. **Stamp Provenance**
   - Front matter: snapshot ID, options, coverage
   - Build manifest: full technical details
   - View log: player-safe summary

4. **Navigation Integrity**
   - All anchors resolve
   - All crosslinks work
   - No orphan pages
   - Codex references land

### Assembly Checklist

```
[ ] Snapshot ID confirmed with Showrunner
[ ] Export options confirmed (formats, art, audio, languages)
[ ] Integrity check run (links, anchors, alt text)
[ ] Bundle assembled in all formats
[ ] Front matter stamped with provenance
[ ] Build manifest created (internal)
[ ] View log created (player-safe)
[ ] Gatekeeper spot-check: green
[ ] Hooks created for any upstream issues
```

### Front Matter Template (Player-Safe)

```
Title: [Book Title]
Snapshot: [snapshot_id]
Formats: [markdown, html, epub, pdf]
Languages: EN (100%), NL (74%)
Art: plans only | full | none
Audio: plans only | full | none
Accessibility: alt text present, captions n/a
Notes: [known limitations]
```

### What Book Binder Does NOT Do

- Edit prose, canon, or codex content
- Export from Hot or mixed sources
- Surface internal details (codewords, seeds, models)
- Make content decisions (Showrunner's domain)

### When to Create Hooks

- Broken anchors → Scene Smith
- Missing codex entries → Codex Curator
- Label inconsistencies → Style Lead
- Missing alt text → Art Director
- Translation gaps → Translator
